curation_notes: Single file patched: uefi_firmware/compression/Tiano/Decompress.c. The primary vulnerability is in MakeTable(), which lacks validation that bit-length values from the bitstream are within 0..16, causing OOB writes to the stack-allocated Count[17] array. ReadPTLen() and ReadCLen() also lacked loop bounds checks allowing writes beyond mPTLen[NPT] and mCLen[NC]. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — LZMA uses a different algorithm without Huffman table construction. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow from CWE-787 is correct; the advisory explicitly describes a stack out-of-bounds write.
